It is the perfect choice when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats. Finish polish for maximum deep shine ### Processing - **Orbital: ** Upper rotational speed range - **By hand: ** Light pressure with circular motions ### Volumes | 250ml | 22992.281.001 | 1l | 22992.261.001 ### Cut/Gloss 2/10 ### Steps **Step 1** Heavy Cut **Step 2** Medium Cut **Step 3** Finish **Step 4** Protection ### Optimised for [ ![image](data:,) Premium Microfiber Cloth ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/premium-microfiber-cloth) [ ![image](data:,) Hand Polishing Applicator ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/hand-polishing-applicator) [ ![image](data:,) Soft Cut Foam Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/soft-cut-foam-pad) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/8/0/csm_menzerna_SFP3800_1100x1100_ab78a03fae.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_SFP3800_1100x1100.png) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/e/d/csm_Autopolitur_Super_Finish_Plus_3800_freigestellt_1100x1100_ed51f149ec.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autopolitur_Super_Finish_Plus_3800_freigestellt_1100x1100.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/8/0/csm_menzerna_SFP3800_1100x1100_1983346c81.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/e/d/csm_Autopolitur_Super_Finish_Plus_3800_freigestellt_1100x1100_82c5613e57.png) [ ](javascript:;) [Find this product at your local dealer](/service/dealer-search) [![image](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22992.261.001/rotation01.jpg)](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22992.261.001/rotation01.jpg) ## More information - [Benefits](javascript:;) - [Recommended usage](javascript:;) - [Process Example](javascript:;) Benefits - Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms - Show-car finish - Silicone-free Recommended usage - Clean the surface thoroughly. - Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad. - We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator. - Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed. - At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible. - Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth. - Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product. Process Example [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-plus-3800) [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) [ ![image](data:,) ](https://www.menzerna.com/car-care/accessories/cleaning-accessories/details/endless-shine) ## Downloads - [ Technical datasheet SFP 3800 94.85 KB ](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_SFP3800_229924_20231113_EN.pdf) ## Related products [ ![image](data:,) Step 3 Final Finish 3000 ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/final-finish-3000) [ ![image](data:,) Step 3 Super Finish 3500 ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-3500) ![image](data:,) /fileadmin/user_upload/SFP_3800.jpg Car polish SFP 3800

The Menzerna SFP 3800 high-gloss polish not only takes care of micro scratches and holograms, but also generates maximum deep shine. The best automotive polish when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats. Show-car finish included.

2021-11-10 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MpSgsbR9Pw0 [ ](javascirpt:;) ##  By clicking on "Load video", I consent to the processing of my data by YouTube. This consent can be revoked at any time with effect for the future. Further information can be found in our [privacy policy](/data-privacy#hideCookiePopup). Load video FAQ ## Questions & answers Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers. [To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs) [Can I apply Menzerna polish by hand?](javascript:;) Yes, Menzerna car polishes can also be used for polishing by hand. In particular, [Medium Cut 2400](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/medium-cut-polish-2400), [One-Step Polish 3in1](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/one-step-polish-3in1) and all Finish polishes and sealants are ideal for application by hand. [How do I use polishes?](javascript:;) Polish is optimally applied using a polishing machine and the corresponding [polishing pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories). A [hand-polishing applicator](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/hand-polishing-applicator) can simplify the process of polishing by hand. [How do I polish a car and achieve a showroom finish?](javascript:;) It takes a multi-stage polishing process to give a car the ultimate level of shine. Menzerna offers various combinations that lead to a showroom finish. For example, the following finishes can be used in the order specified: [HCC 400](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400), [MCP 2500](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/medium-cut-polish-2500), [SFP 3800](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-plus-3800). To maintain the polishing results, a sealant such as [Power Lock](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) can be applied afterwards. [How do I polish a black car?](javascript:;) Black paint is polished like other colors of paint. Either a Heavy Cut, Medium Cut, or Finish polish is selected depending on the condition of the paint. Because even the smallest scratches are easy to see on black cars, we recommend finishing off the polishing process with a Finish polish. The [SF 3500](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-3500) and [SFP 3800](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-plus-3800) gloss polishes create the ultimate shine even on dark paints. [What are holograms?](javascript:;) Holograms are fine polishing marks that can appear when polishing with a Heavy Cut or Medium Cut polish. They can be removed with a fine abrasive polish/a finish. Always up to date ## Register for the newsletter now! Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing. [To the newsletter](/service/newsletter) ## Car polish SFP 3800 The Menzerna SFP 3800 high-gloss polish not only takes care of micro scratches and holograms, but also generates maximum deep shine. The best automotive polish when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats. Show-car finish included. ![image](/typo3conf/ext/pp_products/Resources/Public/images/loader-spinner.svg)
